response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack web/mobile developer but the role demands a Principal Performance Architect with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, and deep-learning workload analysis expertise. The resume shows no GPU architecture, SIMD/MIMD, hardware-software co-design, or DNN training/inference optimization experience, and lacks the PhD/Master's in a relevant hardware field typically expected at this level.
strengths: Long tenure (15+ years) with senior/staff engineering roles
Some low-level C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on LabWindows/CVI
Background in high-throughput, low-latency systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
concerns: No SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator, or GPU architecture experience
No deep neural network training/inference optimization background
Educational path (BS CS) without the hardware/architecture specialization or advanced degree typical for Principal Architect roles

key_factors.factor: Missing AI accelerator / SoC modeling expertise
No GPU/SIMD/MIMD or DNN optimization background
Senior IC experience and longevity in engineering roles
